name: Dharavi Bank
overview: A 30,000 Crore crime nexus is being ruled by the unattainable Thalaivan right in the heart of Mumbai, in Dharavi. JCP Jayant Gavaskar is on a mission to bring down Thalaivan and his adversaries, at any cost.

trailers.title: Dharavi Bank | Official Trailer | Suniel Shetty | Vivek Anand Oberoi | MX Player
